data.title: Bybit will launch BERAUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, the cryptocurrency exchange Bybit will launch the BERAUSDT perpetual contract.

data.title: NEAR Foundation Launches NEAR AI Agent Fund
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to official news, the NEAR Foundation launched the NEAR AI Agent Fund. The fund will deploy $20 million in liquidity to the chain, focusing on expanding the development of fully autonomous and verifiable agents built on NEAR technology, providing support for new decentralized AI use cases and mass-market consumer solutions.

data.title: ARK Invest's ARKK fund sells $6.9 million worth of Robinhood stocks
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Arkk Daily monitoring, ARKK fund under ARK Invest reduced its holdings of Robinhood stocks worth US$6.9 million.

data.title: 1inch Network Integrates ZKsync to Expand Cross-Chain Swap Capabilities
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Decentralized exchange aggregator 1inch Network has integrated ZKsync (a Layer2 expansion solution for Ethereum) to expand its cross-chain exchange capabilities and provide a faster and lower-cost cross-chain transaction experience. 1inch said that the function is powered by its "Fusion+" technology and launched a beta version in September last year, which has facilitated millions of transactions. Currently, ZKsync is advancing its expansion plan with the goal of achieving 10,000 transactions per second and exploring the possibility of zero-fee transactions in the future. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Trump Media Technology Group Seeks Trademark For Truth.Fi Investment Tools
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 6, Trump Media Technology Group filed for trademarks related to the Truth.Fi investment tools. The trademarks include "Truth.Fi BITCOIN PLUS ETF" and "Truth.Fi BITCOIN PLUS SMA."

data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy is Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor, founder of Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy), posted on the X platform: Strategy is Bitcoin. (Note: Strategy means strategy, which is consistent with the name of his company)

data.title: Dingaling opened a position of 20.02 million TST eight hours ago, and now has a floating profit of 625,000 US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the third address on the $TST list is the NFT whale dingaling. Eight hours ago, he spent 17 billion $CHEEMS (about 12,500 US dollars) to build a position of 20.02 million TST, with a cost as low as 0.0006268 US dollars. He has now made a floating profit of 625,000 US dollars. He has now injected all tokens into Pancake to add liquidity.

data.title: Czech Republic cancels capital gains tax on Bitcoin held for more than 3 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Czech President officially signed a bill to abolish capital gains tax for holding Bitcoin for more than 3 years. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: Truth.Fi Seeks Bitcoin ETF Registration
data.description: According to PANews, Truth.Fi, a subsidiary of Trump Media & Technology Group (TMTG), has applied to register the 'Truth.Fi Bitcoin Plus ETF,' marking its entry into the Bitcoin ETF and fintech services sector. TMTG plans to launch various ETFs and customized investment accounts (SMAs), including an American manufacturing-themed ETF, an American energy independence ETF, and Bitcoin-related ETFs. The project is expected to attract up to $250 million in investment, with Charles Schwab serving as the custodian and collaborating with TMTG to develop SMA products.

data.title: Is the Meme Coin Frenzy Truly Over? Not Quite, Says Kaiko Research
data.description:
The post Is the Meme Coin Frenzy Truly Over? Not Quite, Says Kaiko Research appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Meme coins, the fun and often humorous cryptocurrencies that took the internet by storm, have had a rocky start this year. According to a recent Kaiko report, most meme tokens have struggled, with losses ranging from 10% to as much as 70% since the beginning of the year. But...
